sentences.text: Hey, afternoon, Adam.
Hell yeah.
Hey, how's it going, guys?
Sorry, it's been a… Interesting day, to say the least.
All good.
We're, we're close to the end, so hopefully, hopefully you can have a good weekend.
Hopefully, definitely the goal.
What's, what's been going on?
I think it's been a couple months since you and I had our original demo.
Yes, sir.
Yeah, I grabbed a, new portfolio.
Nice.
Yeah, I mean, it's.
It's a special thing, but it's, … it's a lot.
Yeah, is it still, … I remember from our last conversation, everything was kind of being done manually.
Is that still the case with the new portfolio?
Right now, we're kind of still playing, … We're trying to put everything back together, for lack of better terms.
It's, we just got a team on, so I'm trying to help the team as well.
Nice.
… I think, … I don't know if we need to do, like, another actual demo today, I know you've seen it.
No, no, yeah.
I know the, the last time we had spoke at the end, I think you kind of saw the benefits.
I think the next steps for us was to kind of get it in front of, like, the, either the larger team, or I think.
Yes.
your direct boss, so more than happy to kind of talk through that, if you think that's still kind of, like, the best route to maybe, like, re-engage this.
What are your thoughts?
Yeah, I have a meeting on Monday.
Sorry, give me one sec, Hunter, give me 3 seconds.
I had just… someone's walking in.
3 seconds.
Yeah, you're good.
Andre, I'm so sorry, man.
It's okay, you're good.
Ugh.
This has been a wild week.
It just keeps getting, more interesting.
No, but the good thing is, it's like, we're getting our stuff together, but we meet on a… I meet on Monday with everybody.
So, I'll get it right in front of their faces again.
The problem I've been having… Sorry, I just had to list something, too.
I'm, like, out of breath.
Woo!
My boss, they've been going back and forth, and it's funny to say this, to Vegas, because they have all these little conventions, you know, in summer.
So they basically go for a week for all these BS conventions.
Everyone whines and dines them, and they don't end up doing anything with it, so just to get their attention has been a little, a little rough.
Yeah.
No, no.
That goes.
That's the truth of the matter, I don't know how else to verse that.
Yeah, that's kind of… I feel like that's kind of, like, how all those conventions go, honestly.
It's all bullshit.
The problem is, it's like, get their information, get everything you can, because you're gonna try and talk shop, that's the wrong place.
Yeah, I agree, yeah.
So, yeah, I think that's cool.
Anything, anything that I could kind of resend over, just so you kind of have at your disposal for Monday, that would be beneficial?
Yeah, I would definitely just send over, … kind of like the breakdown, in a sense.
a little bit of everything, just so I can kind of present it to them and say, hey.
Here we are.
Yeah, for sure.
I'll, … I'll do kind of, like, a… I'll do, like, a bullet-pointed, kind of breakdown.

I'll give you a slide deck, and then, … I always like to just include some, like, screenshots of, like, the UI, that way they could kind of see, like, what some of the actual, like, reporting looks like.
Yes, that's a good idea as well.

What are your thoughts about, I could also include, like, an ex… like, because you can export all this data out to Excel, we have, like, pre-canned exports, do you think that would be beneficial to include?
It doesn't hurt at all.
Look, the more information, the better, where it says, hey, this is what we're able to provide.
This is why we're able to provide, and it's, you know, kind of like what'll set you apart from everybody else, because you know that we've got a lot of people that always try to pitch us on nonsense.
Yeah, for sure.
Okay.
I'm pretty blunt, sorry about that.
No, I appreciate it.
I like that.
That's better than, ….
Instead of just giving you the smoke, you know?
Totally, dude, totally, I agree.
So, yeah.
It makes things easy, but it's like, to get in with my… with my, like, my, like, the VP, and… Just to kind of get everyone's eyes on it.
It's like I have to go about it in a certain fashion as well, you know?
Totally, yeah.

So I'll, I'll arm you with enough arsenal to hopefully get their attention, and then, get them on a call, and I'll walk them through all demo if they end up liking what they see from what I send over.
Yeah, it's perfect.
The goal is just to get them on the phone.
Yeah.
Trust me, but like I said, it's been, … this whole Vegas schtick.
It's just like, it's been… it's been shitty for me, because it's like, I have other stuff I need to get done, and it's been kind of like the same song and dance.
Yeah, that's true.
You know, it's just, … It is what it is, though, you know?
It doesn't last forever.
Yeah, luckily we're past that, so hopefully….
We're getting there, yeah.
We're getting there.
Hopefully everyone can be more focused, but … yeah, it was nice to catch up.
… glad the week's coming to an end.
Have a great weekend.
I'll put together some collateral, like, right now, once we hang up, and I'll get it to you for, your call on Monday.
That's perfect, bro, that's exactly what I need.
Yeah, it's just something I can show them, I want it to be pretty, like.
How do I say this?
… Like, you're showing someone who's stupid, so they have to look at it quickly.
I hate saying that, because, I mean, I get it, they're not dumb, but, you know….
Like I said, I'm very blunt, and ….
we understand how business can be done.
It's like, you know, a lot of times they'll look at it and they're like, okay, I'm looking at another language, it's not gonna help me here.
Explain what the hell I'm looking at.
Yeah, for sure.
I'll make it as, easy to digest.
Idiot-proof.
Idiot-proof, that's what we're looking for, you know?
There we go.
I hate to say it, but … You know, someone's got to.
Yeah, sure.
Alright, well, cool.
Let me… give me 5-10 minutes, I'll put an email together and include everything that, you should need.
Appreciate you, brother.
Thank you so much, man.
Have a great weekend.
Thanks, bro, peace.
